case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCEY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY VS. AARON WILLIAMS JR

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSEPH A. QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVIES MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCEY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-24-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-24-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL COLLECTIONS MANAGER. DEFENDANT AARON WILLIAMS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCEY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS JR, AARON $1,186.61 PRINCIPAL, $41.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,228.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2019 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $64.94 ACCRUED INTEREST, $85.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCEY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCT-24-19 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2019 - CONTINUED TO OCT-24-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A. QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVIES MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
